title: Day 8 — Built for All 18
script: I've spent the last year thinking about exactly what I want the first supplement I launch to do. The most important thing — it works on hole one all the way through the 18th hole. Pre-workout is the wrong formula. You don't need to recover from a round you haven't finished yet. Portable, no messy drink mix, won't mess with your feel.

captions.instagram: I've spent the last year thinking about exactly what I want the first supplement I launch to do. Pre-workout is the wrong formula — jittery on hole one, crashing on the back nine. You don't need to recover from a round you haven't finished yet. Portable, no messy drink mix, won't mess with your feel. What are you currently using before the round or at the halfway house? #FinishStrong
captions.tiktok: You don't need to recover from a round you haven't finished yet. Portable, no mess, won't affect your feel. What are you using before the round or at the halfway house?

title: Day 7 — The Most Popular Golf Supplement Is a Banana
script: The most popular golf performance supplement right now is a banana at the turn. I've been asking golfers for months what they put in the bag for the back nine — banana, hot dogs, beers, granola bars, Gatorade. Golfers are spoiled with new equipment every year. Why not a supplement that keeps you just as dialed in from hole one to hole 18?

captions.instagram: The most popular golf performance supplement right now is a banana at the turn. Banana, hot dogs, beers, granola bars, Gatorade — and the pre-workout crew thinking gym product transfers to golf. You're jittery on the front nine, crashing on the back. Golfers get new drivers every year. Why not a supplement that keeps you just as dialed in from hole one to 18? What's your back nine hack right now? #KYVOPerformance
captions.tiktok: The most popular golf performance supplement is a banana at the turn. Zins like they're skittles. We've all been there. What's your back nine hack?

title: Day 6 — The Invisible Golfer
script: The golfer I'm building this for — nobody in the supplement industry has ever built a product for them. He's not on tour, but he's also not a beginner. He plays twice a week or twice a month and every time he gets out there, he makes it count. That person has been completely invisible to the supplement industry.

captions.instagram: The golfer I'm building this for — nobody in the supplement industry has ever built a product for them. He's not on tour, but he's also not a beginner. He thinks about that Wednesday round where he left a few strokes on the back nine, or that Saturday morning he lost $15 on the last hole because he couldn't make a five footer. That person has been completely invisible to the supplement industry. If that sounds like you, drop your handicap in the comments below.
captions.tiktok: Not on tour. Not a beginner. Somewhere in the middle — and that's where the most passionate golfers live. Completely invisible to the supplement industry. Drop your handicap if that's you.

title: Day 5 — Glorified Gym Products
script: I've looked at everything that exists for golfers and nothing is actually built for golfers. They're just glorified gym products with golf marketing. Most of these supplements were made for a 45 minute workout — not four hours in the sun on the golf course. There's a hole in the market. I'm the customer. I couldn't find it, so I want to build it.

captions.instagram: I've looked at everything that exists for golfers and nothing is actually built for golfers. They're just glorified gym products with golf marketing. Made for a 45 minute workout — not four hours in the sun on the golf course. There's a hole in the market. I'm the customer. I couldn't find it, so I want to build it. What have you tried on the market and has it actually worked for you? #KYVOPerformance
captions.tiktok: They're just glorified gym products with golf marketing. Made for 45 minutes — not four hours in the sun. What have you tried and has it actually worked?

title: Day 4 — We Deserve More
script: For anyone that has experienced the back nine fade and lost a great round in the last few holes — this is for you. I got tired of trying pre-workouts, energy drinks, drinking endless amounts of coffee trying to stay calm. As a golfer, we deserve more from our energy and our focus on the golf course.

captions.instagram: For anyone that has experienced the back nine fade and lost a great round in the last few holes — this is for you. I got tired of trying pre-workouts, energy drinks, drinking endless amounts of coffee trying to stay calm but have the energy and focus you need for four plus hours on the golf course. As a golfer, we deserve more from our energy and our focus out there. When does the crash usually hit you?
captions.tiktok: Pre-workouts. Energy drinks. Endless coffee. None of it was built for four hours on a golf course. As a golfer, we deserve more. When does the crash usually hit you?

title: Day 3 — It's a Fuel Problem
script: It's taken me 25 years of playing golf to realize this — the back nine fade is not a golf problem. It's a fuel problem. After two to three hours on the course, your blood sugar has dropped, you're mildly dehydrated, and your cortisol is starting to climb. Your brain is just running on fumes. That granola bar at the turn? That is not fueling, that is surviving — and barely.

captions.instagram: It's taken me 25 years of playing golf to realize this — the back nine fade is not a golf problem. It's a fuel problem. After two to three hours on the course, your blood sugar has dropped, you're mildly dehydrated, and your cortisol is starting to climb. Your legs still feel fine, but your brain is just running on fumes. That granola bar at the turn? That is not fueling, that is surviving — and barely. What hole does the crash usually hit you on, and what are you putting in your body at the turn? #KYVOPerformance
captions.tiktok: The back nine fade is not a golf problem. It's a fuel problem. That granola bar at the turn? Not fueling — surviving. What hole does the crash hit you on?

title: Day 2 — It's Not Your Swing
script: Your back nine collapse has nothing to do with your golf swing. Your swing on hole 15 is the same swing you had on hole three. Same mechanics. What's actually breaking down is everything around the swing. The second guessing, the club selection, the patience is gone, the decision-making has completely gone off the rails. Ask yourself: when's the last time your back nine score actually lined up with your front nine?

captions.instagram: Your back nine collapse has nothing to do with your golf swing. Your swing on hole 15 is the same swing you had on hole three — same mechanics. What's actually breaking down is everything around the swing. The second guessing, the club selection, the patience is gone, the decision-making has completely gone off the rails. Ask yourself: when's the last time your back nine score actually lined up with your front nine? What usually breaks down for you — decision-making or commitment to the next shot?
captions.tiktok: You didn't forget how to swing on the back nine. What broke down was everything around it. Decision-making or commitment — what falls apart first?

title: Day 1 — The Beginning
script: I'm building a golf performance brand for golfers by a golfer. I've been playing for over 25 years and I have let more good rounds go on the last three or four holes than I care to admit. I got tired of searching for the perfect supplement for golfers so I decided to build it. But here's the kicker — I've never built a supplement company before. So if you're tired of collapsing on the back nine and you want a way to finish strong, follow along because I'm going to need your help.
